title: selaginella subcordata
intro: Selaginella subcordata, also known as the Chinese spikemoss, is a type of small, delicate plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella subcordata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Selaginella subcordata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
